title: Global Navigation Refactor — Centralized & Type-Safe
objective: Refactor the hardcoded navigation in MainActivity into a dedicated NavGraph component with type-safe Screen routes, enabling clean access to Settings from the Dashboard.
execution_steps: Establish ui.navigation package and defined sealed class Screen
Create NavGraph component and extract logic from MainActivity
Update DashboardScreen with TopAppBar and Settings entry point
Verify navigation works across all screens
definition_of_done: Navigation logic extracted to dedicated package
Routes are type-safe using Screen sealed class
Settings entry point visible on Dashboard
